item.title: Unloading a 20-Foot Container
item.description: A step-by-step look at unloading a large container using proper equipment and positioning. Careful planning ensures safety and efficiency. What’s the most important step?

media:content.media:title: Unloading a 20-Foot Container
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at unloading a large container using proper equipment and positioning. Careful planning ensures safety and efficiency. What’s the most important step?

item.title: Crash in the Snow
item.description: A vehicle crash in snowy conditions requires careful recovery and scene management. What makes snow recoveries especially dangerous?

media:content.media:title: Crash in the Snow
media:content.media:description: A vehicle crash in snowy conditions requires careful recovery and scene management. What makes snow recoveries especially dangerous?

item.title: How to Tow a Burnt Combine
item.description: A look at how a heavily damaged combine is prepared and towed, focusing on safety and proper handling. What steps are most important in a tow like this?

media:content.media:title: How to Tow a Burnt Combine
media:content.media:description: A look at how a heavily damaged combine is prepared and towed, focusing on safety and proper handling. What steps are most important in a tow like this?

item.title: Towing Safely with a Failed Wheel Bearing
item.description: A look at how to manage a towing situation when a wheel bearing fails, focusing on precautions, load control, and minimizing damage. What steps would you take first?

media:content.media:title: Towing Safely with a Failed Wheel Bearing
media:content.media:description: A look at how to manage a towing situation when a wheel bearing fails, focusing on precautions, load control, and minimizing damage. What steps would you take first?

item.title: Can We Pull Him Out?
item.description: A challenging recovery raises questions about technique, safety, and equipment limits. Every move counts in situations like this. What approach would you take?

media:content.media:title: Can We Pull Him Out?
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery raises questions about technique, safety, and equipment limits. Every move counts in situations like this. What approach would you take?

item.title: Heavy Trailer Sinks Through Asphalt
item.description: A heavy trailer presses into soft asphalt, creating a tricky recovery scenario. Conditions like this require planning and precision. How would you handle it?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Trailer Sinks Through Asphalt
media:content.media:description: A heavy trailer presses into soft asphalt, creating a tricky recovery scenario. Conditions like this require planning and precision. How would you handle it?

item.title: Trusting the Pick & Pull
item.description: A recovery situation that depends on the right tools and careful judgment. Knowing when to rely on equipment is essential. Would you take the risk?

item.title: Truck stuck in gravel recovery
item.description: A heavy vehicle gets trapped in loose gravel, requiring careful recovery planning and equipment. What’s the safest way to get it moving again?

media:content.media:title: Truck stuck in gravel recovery
media:content.media:description: A heavy vehicle gets trapped in loose gravel, requiring careful recovery planning and equipment. What’s the safest way to get it moving again?

item.title: Flatbed Load Challenges
item.description: A look at the challenges of securing and transporting loads on a flatbed trailer. Proper balance and planning are key. What’s the most difficult part of load handling?

media:content.media:title: Flatbed Load Challenges
media:content.media:description: A look at the challenges of securing and transporting loads on a flatbed trailer. Proper balance and planning are key. What’s the most difficult part of load handling?

item.title: Just Let Me Pull
item.description: A straightforward recovery approach puts power and precision to work. When does pulling alone get the job done?

media:content.media:title: Just Let Me Pull
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery approach puts power and precision to work. When does pulling alone get the job done?
